name: Kindcard, Inc.
summary: PART I General Unless the context otherwise requires, in this report, the terms Kindcard, Company, KCRD, us, we, or our refers to Kindcard, Inc., a Nevada corporation, and its subsidiaries. The Companys principal office is located at 1001 Yamato Road, #100, Boca Raton, Florida, 33431. The Companys telephone number is (888) 888-0708. The Companys websites are: www.kindcard.com, www.paywithdeb.com, and www.thetendercard.com. The Company reports its operations using a fiscal year ending January 31,...
